# @helia/utils | Helia

*   [Helia](../index.html)
    
*   [@helia/utils](_helia_utils.html)
    

Module @helia/utils
===================

Exports a `Helia` class that implements the Helia API.

In general you should use the `helia` or `@helia/http` modules instead which pre-configure Helia for certain use-cases (p2p or pure-HTTP).

#### Example

    import { Helia } from '@helia/utils'import type { HeliaInit } from '@helia/utils'const node = new Helia({  // ...options} as HeliaInit)
    

[![Helia logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ipfs/helia/main/assets/helia.png)](https://github.com/ipfs/helia "Helia")

[@helia/utils](#md:heliautils)

===============================

[![ipfs.tech](https://img.shields.io/badge/project-IPFS-blue.svg?style=flat-square)](https://ipfs.tech)
 [![Discuss](https://img.shields.io/discourse/https/discuss.ipfs.tech/posts.svg?style=flat-square)](https://discuss.ipfs.tech)
 [![codecov](https://img.shields.io/codecov/c/github/ipfs/helia.svg?style=flat-square)](https://codecov.io/gh/ipfs/helia)
 [![CI](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/ipfs/helia/main.yml?branch=main&style=flat-square)](https://github.com/ipfs/helia/actions/workflows/main.yml?query=branch%3Amain)

> Shared code that implements the Helia API

[About](#md:about)

===================

Exports a `Helia` class that implements the Helia API.

In general you should use the `helia` or `@helia/http` modules instead which pre-configure Helia for certain use-cases (p2p or pure-HTTP).

[Example](#md:example)

-----------------------

    import { Helia } from '@helia/utils'import type { HeliaInit } from '@helia/utils'const node = new Helia({  // ...options} as HeliaInit)
    

[Install](#md:install)

=======================

    $ npm i @helia/utils
    

[Browser `<script>` tag](#md:browser-ltscriptgt-tag)

-----------------------------------------------------

Loading this module through a script tag will make its exports available as `HeliaUtils` in the global namespace.

    <script src="https://unpkg.com/@helia/utils/dist/index.min.js"></script>
    

[API Docs](#md:api-docs)

=========================

*   [https://ipfs.github.io/helia/modules/\_helia\_utils.html](https://ipfs.github.io/helia/modules/_helia_utils.html)
    

[License](#md:license)

=======================

Licensed under either of

*   Apache 2.0, ([LICENSE-APACHE](https://github.com/ipfs/helia/blob/main/packages/utils/LICENSE-APACHE)
     / [http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0](http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
    )
*   MIT ([LICENSE-MIT](https://github.com/ipfs/helia/blob/main/packages/utils/LICENSE-MIT)
     / [http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT](http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)
    )

[Contribute](#md:contribute)

=============================

Contributions welcome! Please check out [the issues](https://github.com/ipfs/helia/issues)
.

Also see our [contributing document](https://github.com/ipfs/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING_JS.md)
 for more information on how we work, and about contributing in general.

Please be aware that all interactions related to this repo are subject to the IPFS [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/ipfs/community/blob/master/code-of-conduct.md)
.

Unless you explicitly state otherwise, any contribution intentionally submitted for inclusion in the work by you, as defined in the Apache-2.0 license, shall be dual licensed as above, without any additional terms or conditions.

[![](https://cdn.rawgit.com/jbenet/contribute-ipfs-gif/master/img/contribute.gif)](https://github.com/ipfs/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md)

# AbortError | IPFS Stores

*   [IPFS Stores](../index.html)
    
*   [interface-store](../modules/interface_store.html)
    
*   [AbortError](interface_store.AbortError.html)
    

Class AbortError

    <[Uint8Array](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)
    \>[](#queryProvider.queryProvider-1)
    
*   The subclass should contact the provider and request the block from it.

    [](#constructor.new_Helia)

    *   init: [HeliaInit](../interfaces/_helia_utils.HeliaInit.html)
        
    
    #### Returns [Helia](_helia_utils.Helia.html)
    

Properties
----------

### blockstore[](#blockstore)

blockstore: [BlockStorage](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html)

Where the blocks are stored

### datastore[](#datastore)

datastore: [Datastore](https://ipfs.github.io/js-stores/interfaces/interface_datastore.index.Datastore.html)
<{}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {}\>

A key/value store

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

#### Type declaration

### dns[](#dns)

dns: [DNS](https://multiformats.github.io/js-dns/interfaces/index.DNS.html)

The DNS property can be used to perform lookups of various record types and will use a resolver appropriate to the current platform.

### getCodec[](#getCodec)

getCodec: [CodecLoader](../interfaces/helia.CodecLoader.html)

Load an IPLD codec. Implementations may return a promise if, for example, the codec is being fetched from the network.

### getHasher[](#getHasher)

getHasher: [HasherLoader](../interfaces/helia.HasherLoader.html)

Hashers can be used to hash a piece of data with the specified hashing algorithm. Implementations may return a promise if, for example, the hasher is being fetched from the network.

### `Private` `Readonly` log[](#log)

log: [Logger](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.Logger.html)

### logger[](#logger)

logger: [ComponentLogger](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.ComponentLogger.html)

A logging component that can be reused by consumers

### `Optional` metrics[](#metrics)

metrics?: [Metrics](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.Metrics.html)

A metrics object that can be used to collected arbitrary stats about node usage.

### pins[](#pins)

pins: [Pins](../interfaces/helia.Pins.html)

Pinning operations for blocks in the blockstore

### routing[](#routing)

routing: [Routing](../interfaces/helia.Routing.html)

The routing component allows performing operations such as looking up content providers, information about peers, etc.

Methods
-------

*   gc(options?): [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <void\>[](#gc.gc-1)

    <void\>[](#start.start-1)
    
*   Starts the Helia node
    
    #### Returns [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <void\>
    

### stop[](#stop)

    <void\>[](#stop.stop-1)
    
*   Stops the Helia node

# BlockStorage | Helia

*   [Helia](../index.html)
    
*   [@helia/utils](../modules/_helia_utils.html)
    
*   [BlockStorage](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html)
    

Class BlockStorage
==================

BlockStorage is a hybrid blockstore that puts/gets blocks from a configured blockstore (that may be on disk, s3, or something else). If the blocks are not present Bitswap will be used to fetch them from network peers.

#### Implements

*   [Blocks](../interfaces/helia.Blocks.html)
    
*   [Startable](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.Startable.html)
    

##### Index

 [lock](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#lock)
 [pins](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#pins)
 [started](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#started)

 [delete](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#delete)
 [deleteMany](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#deleteMany)

 [getMany](_helia_utils.BlockStorage.html#getMany)

        <[GetBlockProgressEvents](../types/helia.GetBlockProgressEvents.html)
        \> = {}
    
    #### Returns [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <[Uint8Array](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)
    \>
    

### getAll[](#getAll)

*   getAll(options?): AsyncIterable<[Pair](../interfaces/helia.Pair.html)
    \>[](#getAll.getAll-1)
    
*   Retrieve all cid/block pairs from the blockstore as an unordered iterable
    
    #### Parameters
    
    *   options: [AbortOptions](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.AbortOptions.html)
         & [ProgressOptions](https://achingbrain.github.io/progress-events/interfaces/ProgressOptions.html)
        <[GetAllBlocksProgressEvents](../types/helia.GetAllBlocksProgressEvents.html)
        \> = {}
    
    #### Returns AsyncIterable<[Pair](../interfaces/helia.Pair.html)
    \>
    
    #### Example
    
        for await (const { multihash, block } of store.getAll()) {  console.log('got:', multihash, block)  // => got MultihashDigest('Qmfoo') Uint8Array[...]}
        
    

### getMany[](#getMany)

*   getMany(cids, options?): AsyncIterable<[Pair](../interfaces/helia.Pair.html)
    \>[](#getMany.getMany-1)
    
*   Get multiple blocks back from an (async) iterable of cids
    
    #### Parameters
    
    *   cids: [AwaitIterable](../types/helia.AwaitIterable.html)
        <[CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
        <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
        \>\>
    *   options: [GetOfflineOptions](../interfaces/helia.GetOfflineOptions.html)
         & [AbortOptions](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.AbortOptions.html)
         & [ProgressOptions](https://achingbrain.github.io/progress-events/interfaces/ProgressOptions.html)
        <[GetManyBlocksProgressEvents](../types/helia.GetManyBlocksProgressEvents.html)
        \> = {}
    
    #### Returns AsyncIterable<[Pair](../interfaces/helia.Pair.html)
    \>
    

### has[](#has)

*   has(cid, options?): [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <boolean\>[](#has.has-1)
    
*   Check for the existence of a value for the passed key
    
    #### Parameters
    
    *   cid: [CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
        <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
        \>
    *   options: [AbortOptions](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.AbortOptions.html)
         = {}
    
    #### Returns [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <boolean\>
    
    #### Example
    
        const exists = await store.has(new Key('awesome'))if (exists) { console.log('it is there')} else { console.log('it is not there')}
        
    

### isStarted[](#isStarted)

*   isStarted(): boolean[](#isStarted.isStarted-1)
    
*   #### Returns boolean
    

### put[](#put)

*   put(cid, block, options?): [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <[CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
    <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
    \>\>[](#put.put-1)
    
*   Put a block to the underlying datastore
    
    #### Parameters
    
    *   cid: [CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
        <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
        \>
    *   block: [Uint8Array](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)
        
    *   options: [AbortOptions](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.AbortOptions.html)
         & [ProgressOptions](https://achingbrain.github.io/progress-events/interfaces/ProgressOptions.html)
        <[PutBlockProgressEvents](../types/helia.PutBlockProgressEvents.html)
        \> = {}
    
    #### Returns [Promise](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Promise)
    <[CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
    <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
    \>\>
    

### putMany[](#putMany)

*   putMany(blocks, options?): AsyncIterable<[CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
    <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
    \>\>[](#putMany.putMany-1)
    
*   Put a multiple blocks to the underlying datastore
    
    #### Parameters
    
    *   blocks: [AwaitIterable](../types/helia.AwaitIterable.html)
        <{  
            block: [Uint8Array](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Uint8Array)
        ;  
            cid: [CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
        <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
        \>;  
        }\>
    *   options: [AbortOptions](https://libp2p.github.io/js-libp2p/interfaces/_libp2p_interface.AbortOptions.html)
         & [ProgressOptions](https://achingbrain.github.io/progress-events/interfaces/ProgressOptions.html)
        <[PutManyBlocksProgressEvents](../types/helia.PutManyBlocksProgressEvents.html)
        \> = {}
    
    #### Returns AsyncIterable<[CID](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/classes/cid.CID.html)
    <unknown, number, number, [Version](https://multiformats.github.io/js-multiformats/types/link_interface.Version.html)
    \>\>

?: number;

: string;

?: ((evt) => void);

#### Hierarchy ([view full](../hierarchy.html#@helia/utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions)
)

*   [CreateSessionOptions](helia.CreateSessionOptions.html)
    *   AbstractCreateSessionOptions

##### Index

### Properties

[maxProviders?](_helia_utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions.html#maxProviders)
 [minProviders?](_helia_utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions.html#minProviders)
 [name](_helia_utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions.html#name)
 [onProgress?](_helia_utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions.html#onProgress)
 [signal?](_helia_utils.AbstractCreateSessionOptions.html#signal)

Properties
----------

### `Optional` maxProviders[](#maxProviders)

maxProviders?: number

The maximum number of providers for the root CID to be added to a session.

#### Default

    5
    

### `Optional` minProviders[](#minProviders)

minProviders?: number

The minimum number of providers for the root CID that are required for successful session creation.

The session will become usable once this many providers have been discovered, up to `maxProviders` providers will continue to be added.

#### Default

    1
    

### name[](#name)

name: string

### `Optional` onProgress[](#onProgress)

onProgress?: ((evt) => void)

#### Type declaration

*   *   (evt): void
    *   #### Parameters
        
        *   evt: [ProgressEvent](https://achingbrain.github.io/progress-events/interfaces/ProgressEvent.html)
            <any, any\>
        
        #### Returns void
        

### `Optional` signal[](#signal)

signal?: [AbortSignal](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/AbortSignal)
